title: Open LIRS Website
description: Navigate to the LIRS website to begin your tax payment process.

title: Login to Your Account
description: Click on Login and enter your credentials to access your account.

title: Access Pay Online
description: Click on "Pay Online" from your dashboard.

title: Generate Bill Page
description: You will see a Generate A New Bill page

title: Select Agency (LGA)
description: Choose your Local Government Area (LGA) from the list.

title: Select Revenue Type
description: Select "Self Assessment" as the revenue type.

title: Choose Currency
description: Select your preferred currency for payment.

title: Select Payment Period
description: Choose the relevant tax period for the payment.

title: One-Time Payment Option
description: Click the checkbox if this is a one-time payment.

title: Enter Amount
description: Enter the amount you want to pay. If you don’t know the amount. we can help you calculate it. Go to https://easy-tax.lovable.app/app/tax-calculator

title: Add Remark
description: Add a short remark or description for your payment.

title: Generate Bill
description: Click on Generate to create your bill.

title: Confirm Payment
description: Review your details and confirm the payment.

title: View Bill
description: Your generated bill will appear in the bill section.

title: Select Payment Channel
description: Choose your preferred payment channel from the list.

title: Make Payment
description: Complete the payment process using your selected method.

title: Payment Successful
description: Congratulations! You have successfully paid your tax.

title: File Tax Return
description: If you want to file a tax return, click on this link - [Coming Soon]
